title: Author lib-level test coverage for md format (SwiftMDFormatter) in tests/md-core-tests/
description: md format audit + md format fix subcommands were absorbed from the legacy swift-md-formatter-cli package (deleted during Phase 2 consolidation 2026-05-31). The legacy package's tests, if any, were not migrated. Currently the test target tests/md-core-tests/ has 50 tests covering FrontmatterParser, MarkdownBlockExtractor, ShinjiTechoEntryDerivation, MirrorRenderer, ReflectAbsorber, MarkdownToHTMLRenderer — but ZERO coverage of SwiftMDFormatter (MarkdownHeadingCapitalization, SwiftMDFormatter, SwiftMDCodeBlockFormatter, MarkdownSwiftCodeBlocks, MarkdownFormatEvent, MarkdownFormattingPreview, MarkdownFormatResult). md.qa-evidence-packet.json marks this as smoke-tested-only with a futureFollowOnBead pointing here. Resolution: add tests/md-core-tests/SwiftMDFormatterTests.swift exercising the heading-capitalization pass + swift-codeblock-formatting pass + the FormattingCommandRunner contract; add tests/md-core-tests/MDFixCommandTests.swift exercising the audit-vs-fix-mode delta. Pairs with [[bead:md-lint-lib-test-coverage]] (sibling absorption gap).
closedNote: Test files recovered via git show from parent of Phase 2 absorption deletion commit (0c495a23) and ported to tests/md-core-tests/. 66 total tests passing. qa-evidence-packet coverageMap updated to coverageStatus: covered.
